Serialized Form

  • Package forager.agents

    • Class forager.agents.MadkitAgent extends Agent implements Serializable

      serialVersionUID:
      -68366833257439L

      • Serialized Fields

        • environnement

          Environnement environnement
          Environnement of the agent.

        • brain

          Brain brain
          Brain of the agent.

        • col

          Color col
          Color of the agent.

        • direction

          Vector2D direction
          Last movement vector applied.

        • inventory

          Inventory inventory
          Agent's inventory.

        • hitbox

          Rectangle hitbox
          Agent's hitbox.

        • visionRange

          int visionRange
          Maximum vision distance.

        • hunger

          int hunger
          Current hunger.

        • maxHunger

          int maxHunger
          Maximum of hunger before dying.

        • id

          int id
          Id of the agent.

        • team

          String team
          The team of the agent

        • messageBox

          ArrayDeque<E> messageBox
          All message received since the last checkout.

        • messageVerification

          ArrayList<E> messageVerification
          Same as message box, not cleared on message box request, used to verify that message aren't forged by the brain.

  • Package forager.ui

    • Class forager.ui.EnvironnementUI extends JPanel implements Serializable

      serialVersionUID:
      1L

      • Serialized Fields

        • environnement

          Environnement environnement
          The environnement to display.

        • size

          Dimension size
          The size of the panel.

        • timer

          Timer timer
          A timer to trigger repaint.
